Defendant Nissan North America, Inc.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Apr-05-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NISSAN NORTH AMERICA, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings.

Defendant Nissan North America, Inc.'s (Nissan) motion to compel arbitration is granted. The proceedings are ordered stayed pending the outcome of arbitration.(see word minutes for full details)

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEFENDANT NISSAN NORTH AMERICA, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS (PART 1 OF 2)
Off Calendar Apr-05-2023 Off Calendar
